_comment: FTSE 250 index daily official close (16:30 London time). Source: Yahoo Finance (^FTMC) chart API. Trading days only.

methodology.indicator: FTSE 250 (^FTMC) — daily close as reported by Yahoo Finance
methodology.release_cadence: daily (LSE trading days, Mon-Fri excluding UK bank holidays)
methodology.extraction_notes: Pulled v8 chart JSON for ^FTMC at daily granularity covering 2024-07-04 to 2026-04-24. Yahoo's response excludes weekends and LSE holidays. Closes rounded to nearest integer to match the live fixture style. Timestamps fixed at 16:30 UTC year-round to mirror packages/data-sources/src/fixtures/ftse-250.json. KNOWN ANCHOR DRIFT: Yahoo's 2026-04-23 close is 22765, while the live fixture (sourced from the LSEG closing-level page) records 22984 — a ~0.96% gap that recurs across the most recent weeks (Yahoo runs ~150-220 points light vs LSEG end-of-auction prints in late April 2026). For trend / percentile work this is immaterial; for absolute headline comparison the live LSEG fixture remains authoritative for the latest single value.
